calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-016 ContextMemory slot-store / attention-uniformity diagnostic
items.note: Diagnostic probe (EXP-0155 scope per ree-v3/CLAUDE.md SD-016 section). Instruments full forward path -- slot-store writes, key_proj.bias dominance, write_gate saturation, world_query_proj batch-constancy -- to discriminate root cause of attn_entropy=ln(16) uniform-attention bug before any EXQ-418b successor. Evidence class: diagnostic_probe (excluded from governance scoring).
